name: Zucchini Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. Beat together margarine, cooking oil, and sugar until smooth.
3. Add eggs, vanilla extract, buttermilk, and grated zucchini to the mixture.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients until just combined.
5. Pour batter into a greased 13-inch x 9-inch pan.
6. Sprinkle with chocolate chips and chopped nuts.
7. Bake at 325°F for 50-55 minutes, or until set.
